changeSet.author: pkomena

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.site_information WHERE name = 'National ID required' AND value <> 'false'

changeSet.author: pkomena

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.site_information WHERE name = 'default language locale' AND value <> 'fr-FR'

changeSet.author: pkomena

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.site_information WHERE name = 'Accession number prefix' AND domain_id IS DISTINCT FROM (SELECT id FROM clinlims.site_information_domain WHERE name = 'siteIdentity' LIMIT 1)

changeSet.sql: UPDATE clinlims.site_information SET domain_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.site_information_domain WHERE name = 'siteIdentity' LIMIT 1), lastupdated = now() WHERE name = 'Accession number prefix';

changeSet.author: pkomena

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.site_information WHERE name = 'TrainingInstallation' AND domain_id IS DISTINCT FROM (SELECT id FROM clinlims.site_information_domain WHERE name = 'siteIdentity' LIMIT 1)

changeSet.sql: UPDATE clinlims.site_information SET domain_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.site_information_domain WHERE name = 'siteIdentity' LIMIT 1), lastupdated = now() WHERE name = 'TrainingInstallation';
